title: Reference Frames
body: The velocity of a particle in reference frame A is $$(2.0\hat{i}+3.0\hat{j})$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. The velocity of reference frame A with respect to reference frame B is $$4.0\hat{k}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$, and the velocity of reference frame B with respect to C is $$2.0\hat{j}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$.
lesson: 4. Motion in Two and Three Dimensions
